basic_details.job_title: District Kangra Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Naib-Tehsildar, Kanungo and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: District Kangra Naib-Tehsildar, Kanungo & Patwari Notification 2026 has been released on the official website kangra.nic.in. Eligible candidates can apply for the Naib-Tehsildar, Kanungo & Patwari posts through the District Kangra Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Not more than 65 years of age on the date of advertisement of vacancies.
age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 65 years Age relaxation is applicable as per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Minimum 5 years of service in any wing of revenue Department of HP and having no departmental/disciplinary proceeding pending against them.
qualification.details: Patwari/Kanungos: Minimum 5 years of service in any wing of revenue Department of HP No departmental/disciplinary proceeding pending against them

selection_process: Re-engagement on remuneration basis Consideration for respective post on the recommendations of the committee Preference to junior in age if applications exceed vacancies
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download District Kangra Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download District Kangra Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the District Kangra recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the District Kangra recruitment is 30th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated office before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the posts available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for the posts of Naib-Tehsildar, Kanungo, and Patwari within the District Kangra administration.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for these positions?
faq.answer: The application mode for these positions is offline. Candidates need to send their application forms to the specified address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum service requirement for eligibility?
faq.answer: For Patwari and Kanungo posts, a minimum of 5 years of service in any wing of the revenue department of Himachal Pradesh is required.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any age limit for the applicants?
faq.answer: Yes, applicants should not be more than 65 years of age on the date of the advertisement of vacancies.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for each post?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Naib-Tehsildar: 60000/-, Kanungo: 50000/-, and Patwari: 40000/-.

faq.question: Q7. Are there any departmental proceedings that should not be pending against the applicant?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates must not have any departmental or disciplinary proceedings pending against them to be eligible.

faq.question: Q8. Where should the application form be sent?
faq.answer: The application form along with all relevant documents should be sent to the office of the Deputy Commissioner, Kangra at Dharamshala.

faq.question: Q9. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for contract-based positions.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 3364-3425/SK/EK.
